src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Register the new Platform class for serialization in GraalVM native image runtime hints to ensure it works correctly at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent dependency from 3.0.1 to 3.4.4 to support Java 21 and access newer features.

.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.general_idea: Explicitly configure the runner to use JDK 21, which is required for the application to compile and run on the target platform.
.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.human_impl:
uses: actions/setup-java@v4
with:
    distribution: temurin
    java-version: 21

src/main/docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Updated environment variable prefixes from 'SPRING_REDIS_' to 'SPRING_DATA_REDIS_' to match Spring Boot 3.x configuration property naming conventions.

src/main/k8s/configMap.yaml.general_idea: Update environment variable prefixes from SPRING_REDIS to SPRING_DATA_REDIS to align with Spring Boot 3.x property binding conventions.
